products.name: Desiccant Breathers
products.shortDescription: Desiccant Breathers protect diesel and lubricant storage by removing moisture and airborne contaminants. The color-changing silica shows when it is time to replace, making tank protection simple and reliable.
products.description: Desiccant Breathers provide contamination control for diesel, lubricants, and storage tanks by filtering incoming air and absorbing moisture. This helps prevent rust, sludge, and microbial growth while improving equipment reliability. They are suitable for diesel storage tanks, lubricant storage tanks, and lube trucks. The breathers are fully disposable, long lasting, and available in low-profile options where space is limited. Removes moisture and airborne contamination Helps extend fluid and equipment life Designed for diesel and lubricant storage applications Color-changing silica shows when replacement is needed Available individually or as part of site starter kits These breathers serve as an easy first line of defense for facilities that want cleaner fluids and fewer contamination problems in their storage systems.

products.name: Turbo II HD
products.shortDescription: Durable Rugged metal design means Turbo II is more resistant to damage and longer lasting Improved Filtration 80% to 90% improved filtration from competitors More Protective Provides boosted protection to engine components leading to longer lasting parts
products.description:
Cleaner Air, Longer Engine Life 
 
Experience the unmatched performance of the Turbo II Precleaner, designed to provide superior air filtration and protect your engine in the harshest environments. With its innovative design and proven track record, Turbo II sets the standard for precleaners worldwide. 
 
 Uncompromising Protection for Your Engine 
 
Turbo II ensures that only purified air enters your engine, preventing micro-abrasive dust from causing damage and reducing engine life. Its durable metal construction, combined with high efficiency and low restriction, makes it the top choice for equipment operators in a wide range of applications, including loaders, graders, crushers, haulers, mixers, and mining machines. 
 
 Key Features and Benefits: 
 
 Safe and Simple Prefilter: 
 
 With over 40 years on the market, Turbo II has stood the test of time as the most trusted precleaner. 
 It operates as a top-down precleaner, drawing dirty air through a protective screen at the top of the unit. 
 Turbo II has been proven not to damage engines and will not void engine warranties. 
 Maintenance-free and easy to install, it offers hassle-free operation. 
 
 
 Improved Filtration and Filter Life Extension: 
 
 Turbo II eliminates micro dust and provides an 80% improvement in filtration. 
 It extends filter life by 3-5 times, reducing the frequency and cost of filter replacements. 
 With Turbo II, you can enjoy increased engine longevity and lower maintenance expenses. 
 
 
 Innovative Design and Operation: 
 
 Turbo II's metal design creates a "TOP DOWN" airflow, drawing air through a protective screen at the top. 
 Aerodynamically designed overlapping vanes force the incoming air to spin, separating dust and dirt by centrifugal force. 
 Dust and debris spin down the wall of the main chamber and are discharged through ports at the base of the unit. 
 The primary air stream's increased velocity ejects additional dirt and debris, delivering the cleanest air possible to the filter element. 
 The design achieves an exceptional balance between added restriction and efficiency. 
 
 
 Maintenance-Free and Reliable: 
 
 The Turbo II Precleaner has only one moving part, the spinner, which features shielded, precision ball bearings. 
 The spinner is fully lifetime warranted against failure and is virtually maintenance-free. 
 Increased air filter element life translates into significant savings in filter elements and servicing labor. 
 
 
 Tested to Industry Standards: 
 
 Turbo Precleaners are independently tested to meet industry SAE J726 standards, ensuring their reliability and performance. 
 
 
 
Invest in the Turbo II Precleaner for ultimate engine protection and cleaner air. Enjoy the peace of mind that comes with extended filter life and increased engine longevity. With Turbo II, your engine stays protected, no matter the application or operating conditions. 
 
 Choose EcoPro for superior filtration solutions.

tabs.maintenance: Replacing Spinner (PDF) Pre-Screen Cleaning (PDF) Air Filter Pre-Cleaner (PDF) The Turbo II precleaner is designed for fast and straightforward installation on heavy equipment. When installed correctly, the system provides immediate protection and improved air filtration performance. Approximate installation time: 0.5 hours Installation Support For machine-specific installation instructions or guidance, please contact EcoPro directly. Contact us for machine-specific installation instructions Optional Installation Components Some applications may require additional hardware to ensure proper fitment and optimal performance. Metal Stack Extension View available metal stack extensions Metal Adapter View available metal adapters
tabs.warranty: Air Filter PreCleaner In most operating conditions, the Turbo II precleaner requires little to no routine maintenance. In extreme environments with high debris exposure, periodic inspection and cleaning may be required to maintain optimal performance. Extreme Environment Maintenance In severe operating conditions, the following maintenance steps may be necessary: PreScreen cleaning Remove the PreScreen, clean with soap and water, and reinstall once fully dry. Ejection port cleaning Inspect and clean debris from the ejection ports as outlined in the maintenance guide. Bearing inspection Excess debris buildup may lead to bearing failure. If bearing issues are suspected, contact EcoPro for support. Regular inspection in extreme conditions helps ensure continued performance and long service life. Air Filter PreCleaner
tabs.pdfsAndVideos: Turbo II precleaner systems are backed by a warranty that reflects their proven design and long service life. Warranty Coverage Most Turbo II systems include a two-year warranty covering materials and workmanship. This warranty does not cover damage caused by neglect, misuse, improper installation, or lack of maintenance. TURBO II HD precleaners are warranted for two years from the date of purchase.

tabs.description:
Cleaner Air, Longer Engine Life 
 
Experience the unmatched performance of the Turbo II Precleaner, designed to provide superior air filtration and protect your engine in the harshest environments. With its innovative design and proven track record, Turbo II sets the standard for precleaners worldwide. 
 
 Uncompromising Protection for Your Engine 
 
Turbo II ensures that only purified air enters your engine, preventing micro-abrasive dust from causing damage and reducing engine life. Its durable metal construction, combined with high efficiency and low restriction, makes it the top choice for equipment operators in a wide range of applications, including loaders, graders, crushers, haulers, mixers, and mining machines. 
 
 Key Features and Benefits: 
 
 Safe and Simple Prefilter: 
 
 With over 40 years on the market, Turbo II has stood the test of time as the most trusted precleaner. 
 It operates as a top-down precleaner, drawing dirty air through a protective screen at the top of the unit. 
 Turbo II has been proven not to damage engines and will not void engine warranties. 
 Maintenance-free and easy to install, it offers hassle-free operation. 
 
 
 Improved Filtration and Filter Life Extension: 
 
 Turbo II eliminates micro dust and provides an 80% improvement in filtration. 
 It extends filter life by 3-5 times, reducing the frequency and cost of filter replacements. 
 With Turbo II, you can enjoy increased engine longevity and lower maintenance expenses. 
 
 
 Innovative Design and Operation: 
 
 Turbo II's metal design creates a "TOP DOWN" airflow, drawing air through a protective screen at the top. 
 Aerodynamically designed overlapping vanes force the incoming air to spin, separating dust and dirt by centrifugal force. 
 Dust and debris spin down the wall of the main chamber and are discharged through ports at the base of the unit. 
 The primary air stream's increased velocity ejects additional dirt and debris, delivering the cleanest air possible to the filter element. 
 The design achieves an exceptional balance between added restriction and efficiency. 
 
 
 Maintenance-Free and Reliable: 
 
 The Turbo II Precleaner has only one moving part, the spinner, which features shielded, precision ball bearings. 
 The spinner is fully lifetime warranted against failure and is virtually maintenance-free. 
 Increased air filter element life translates into significant savings in filter elements and servicing labor. 
 
 
 Tested to Industry Standards: 
 
 Turbo Precleaners are independently tested to meet industry SAE J726 standards, ensuring their reliability and performance. 
 
 
 
Invest in the Turbo II Precleaner for ultimate engine protection and cleaner air. Enjoy the peace of mind that comes with extended filter life and increased engine longevity. With Turbo II, your engine stays protected, no matter the application or operating conditions. 
 
 Choose EcoPro for superior filtration solutions.

tabs.warranty: In most operating conditions, the Turbo II precleaner requires little to no routine maintenance. In extreme environments with high debris exposure, periodic inspection and cleaning may be required to maintain optimal performance. Extreme Environment Maintenance In severe operating conditions, the following maintenance steps may be necessary: PreScreen cleaning Remove the PreScreen, clean with soap and water, and reinstall once fully dry. Ejection port cleaning Inspect and clean debris from the ejection ports as outlined in the maintenance guide. Bearing inspection Excess debris buildup may lead to bearing failure. If bearing issues are suspected, contact EcoPro for support. Regular inspection in extreme conditions helps ensure continued performance and long service life.
tabs.pdfsAndVideos: Turbo II precleaner systems are backed by a warranty that reflects their proven design and long service life. Warranty Coverage Most Turbo II systems include a two-year warranty covering materials and workmanship. This warranty does not cover damage caused by neglect, misuse, improper installation, or lack of maintenance. TURBO II HD precleaners are warranted for two years from the date of purchase.

tabs.warranty: In most operating conditions, the Turbo II precleaner requires little to no routine maintenance. In extreme environments with high debris exposure, periodic inspection and cleaning may be required to maintain optimal performance. Extreme Environment Maintenance In severe operating conditions, the following maintenance steps may be necessary: PreScreen cleaning Remove the PreScreen, clean with soap and water, and reinstall once fully dry. Ejection port cleaning Inspect and clean debris from the ejection ports as outlined in the maintenance guide. Bearing inspection Excess debris buildup may lead to bearing failure. If bearing issues are suspected, contact EcoPro for support. Regular inspection in extreme conditions helps ensure continued performance and long service life.

products.name: T2-826K-LF
products.shortDescription: Heavy Duty PreCleaner Upgrade Kit for all 826Ks: TURBOII-LG, HD PreScreen, TUR-ASP-PLG-150, TUR-ASP-PLG-200 (includes HD PreScreen & Rubber Adapter, no metal adapter)
products.description:
Cleaner Air, Longer Engine Life 
 
Experience the unmatched performance of the Turbo II Precleaner, designed to provide superior air filtration and protect your engine in the harshest environments. With its innovative design and proven track record, Turbo II sets the standard for precleaners worldwide. 
 
 Uncompromising Protection for Your Engine 
 
Turbo II ensures that only purified air enters your engine, preventing micro-abrasive dust from causing damage and reducing engine life. Its durable metal construction, combined with high efficiency and low restriction, makes it the top choice for equipment operators in a wide range of applications, including loaders, graders, crushers, haulers, mixers, and mining machines. 
 
 Key Features and Benefits: 
 
 Safe and Simple Prefilter: 
 
 With over 40 years on the market, Turbo II has stood the test of time as the most trusted precleaner. 
 It operates as a top-down precleaner, drawing dirty air through a protective screen at the top of the unit. 
 Turbo II has been proven not to damage engines and will not void engine warranties. 
 Maintenance-free and easy to install, it offers hassle-free operation. 
 
 
 Improved Filtration and Filter Life Extension: 
 
 Turbo II eliminates micro dust and provides an 80% improvement in filtration. 
 It extends filter life by 3-5 times, reducing the frequency and cost of filter replacements. 
 With Turbo II, you can enjoy increased engine longevity and lower maintenance expenses. 
 
 
 Innovative Design and Operation: 
 
 Turbo II's metal design creates a "TOP DOWN" airflow, drawing air through a protective screen at the top. 
 Aerodynamically designed overlapping vanes force the incoming air to spin, separating dust and dirt by centrifugal force. 
 Dust and debris spin down the wall of the main chamber and are discharged through ports at the base of the unit. 
 The primary air stream's increased velocity ejects additional dirt and debris, delivering the cleanest air possible to the filter element. 
 The design achieves an exceptional balance between added restriction and efficiency. 
 
 
 Maintenance-Free and Reliable: 
 
 The Turbo II Precleaner has only one moving part, the spinner, which features shielded, precision ball bearings. 
 The spinner is fully lifetime warranted against failure and is virtually maintenance-free. 
 Increased air filter element life translates into significant savings in filter elements and servicing labor. 
 
 
 Tested to Industry Standards: 
 
 Turbo Precleaners are independently tested to meet industry SAE J726 standards, ensuring their reliability and performance. 
 
 
 
Invest in the Turbo II Precleaner for ultimate engine protection and cleaner air. Enjoy the peace of mind that comes with extended filter life and increased engine longevity. With Turbo II, your engine stays protected, no matter the application or operating conditions. 
 
 Choose EcoPro for superior filtration solutions.

tabs.description:
Cleaner Air, Longer Engine Life 
 
Experience the unmatched performance of the Turbo II Precleaner, designed to provide superior air filtration and protect your engine in the harshest environments. With its innovative design and proven track record, Turbo II sets the standard for precleaners worldwide. 
 
 Uncompromising Protection for Your Engine 
 
Turbo II ensures that only purified air enters your engine, preventing micro-abrasive dust from causing damage and reducing engine life. Its durable metal construction, combined with high efficiency and low restriction, makes it the top choice for equipment operators in a wide range of applications, including loaders, graders, crushers, haulers, mixers, and mining machines. 
 
 Key Features and Benefits: 
 
 Safe and Simple Prefilter: 
 
 With over 40 years on the market, Turbo II has stood the test of time as the most trusted precleaner. 
 It operates as a top-down precleaner, drawing dirty air through a protective screen at the top of the unit. 
 Turbo II has been proven not to damage engines and will not void engine warranties. 
 Maintenance-free and easy to install, it offers hassle-free operation. 
 
 
 Improved Filtration and Filter Life Extension: 
 
 Turbo II eliminates micro dust and provides an 80% improvement in filtration. 
 It extends filter life by 3-5 times, reducing the frequency and cost of filter replacements. 
 With Turbo II, you can enjoy increased engine longevity and lower maintenance expenses. 
 
 
 Innovative Design and Operation: 
 
 Turbo II's metal design creates a "TOP DOWN" airflow, drawing air through a protective screen at the top. 
 Aerodynamically designed overlapping vanes force the incoming air to spin, separating dust and dirt by centrifugal force. 
 Dust and debris spin down the wall of the main chamber and are discharged through ports at the base of the unit. 
 The primary air stream's increased velocity ejects additional dirt and debris, delivering the cleanest air possible to the filter element. 
 The design achieves an exceptional balance between added restriction and efficiency. 
 
 
 Maintenance-Free and Reliable: 
 
 The Turbo II Precleaner has only one moving part, the spinner, which features shielded, precision ball bearings. 
 The spinner is fully lifetime warranted against failure and is virtually maintenance-free. 
 Increased air filter element life translates into significant savings in filter elements and servicing labor. 
 
 
 Tested to Industry Standards: 
 
 Turbo Precleaners are independently tested to meet industry SAE J726 standards, ensuring their reliability and performance. 
 
 
 
Invest in the Turbo II Precleaner for ultimate engine protection and cleaner air. Enjoy the peace of mind that comes with extended filter life and increased engine longevity. With Turbo II, your engine stays protected, no matter the application or operating conditions. 
 
 Choose EcoPro for superior filtration solutions.

tabs.warranty: In most operating conditions, the Turbo II precleaner requires little to no routine maintenance. In extreme environments with high debris exposure, periodic inspection and cleaning may be required to maintain optimal performance. Extreme Environment Maintenance In severe operating conditions, the following maintenance steps may be necessary: PreScreen cleaning Remove the PreScreen, clean with soap and water, and reinstall once fully dry. Ejection port cleaning Inspect and clean debris from the ejection ports as outlined in the maintenance guide. Bearing inspection Excess debris buildup may lead to bearing failure. If bearing issues are suspected, contact EcoPro for support. Regular inspection in extreme conditions helps ensure continued performance and long service life.
tabs.pdfsAndVideos: Turbo II precleaner systems are backed by a warranty that reflects their proven design and long service life. Warranty Coverage Most Turbo II systems include a two-year warranty covering materials and workmanship. This warranty does not cover damage caused by neglect, misuse, improper installation, or lack of maintenance. TURBO II HD precleaners are warranted for two years from the date of purchase.

Extreme Environment Maintenance In severe operating conditions, the following maintenance steps may be necessary: PreScreen cleaning Remove the PreScreen, clean with soap and water, and reinstall once fully dry. Ejection port cleaning Inspect and clean debris from the ejection ports as outlined in the maintenance guide. Bearing inspection Excess debris buildup may lead to bearing failure. If bearing issues are suspected, contact EcoPro for support. Regular inspection in extreme conditions helps ensure continued performance and long service life.
tabs.pdfsAndVideos: Turbo II precleaner systems are backed by a warranty that reflects their proven design and long service life. Warranty Coverage Most Turbo II systems include a two-year warranty covering materials and workmanship. This warranty does not cover damage caused by neglect, misuse, improper installation, or lack of maintenance. TURBO II HD precleaners are warranted for two years from the date of purchase.

products.name: T2-320-LF
products.shortDescription: Heavy Duty PreCleaner Upgrade Kit for all CAT320s: TURBOII-MD, HD PreScreen, TUR-ASP-PLG-150, TUR-ASP-PLG-200 (includes HD PreScreen * Rubber adapter, no metal adpater, intake diameter sizes available: 4.5", 5", 6")
products.description:
Cleaner Air, Longer Engine Life 
 
Experience the unmatched performance of the Turbo II Precleaner, designed to provide superior air filtration and protect your engine in the harshest environments. With its innovative design and proven track record, Turbo II sets the standard for precleaners worldwide. 
 
 Uncompromising Protection for Your Engine 
 
Turbo II ensures that only purified air enters your engine, preventing micro-abrasive dust from causing damage and reducing engine life. Its durable metal construction, combined with high efficiency and low restriction, makes it the top choice for equipment operators in a wide range of applications, including loaders, graders, crushers, haulers, mixers, and mining machines. 
 
 Key Features and Benefits: 
 
 Safe and Simple Prefilter: 
 
 With over 40 years on the market, Turbo II has stood the test of time as the most trusted precleaner. 
 It operates as a top-down precleaner, drawing dirty air through a protective screen at the top of the unit. 
 Turbo II has been proven not to damage engines and will not void engine warranties. 
 Maintenance-free and easy to install, it offers hassle-free operation. 
 
 
 Improved Filtration and Filter Life Extension: 
 
 Turbo II eliminates micro dust and provides an 80% improvement in filtration. 
 It extends filter life by 3-5 times, reducing the frequency and cost of filter replacements. 
 With Turbo II, you can enjoy increased engine longevity and lower maintenance expenses. 
 
 
 Innovative Design and Operation: 
 
 Turbo II's metal design creates a "TOP DOWN" airflow, drawing air through a protective screen at the top. 
 Aerodynamically designed overlapping vanes force the incoming air to spin, separating dust and dirt by centrifugal force. 
 Dust and debris spin down the wall of the main chamber and are discharged through ports at the base of the unit. 
 The primary air stream's increased velocity ejects additional dirt and debris, delivering the cleanest air possible to the filter element. 
 The design achieves an exceptional balance between added restriction and efficiency. 
 
 
 Maintenance-Free and Reliable: 
 
 The Turbo II Precleaner has only one moving part, the spinner, which features shielded, precision ball bearings. 
 The spinner is fully lifetime warranted against failure and is virtually maintenance-free. 
 Increased air filter element life translates into significant savings in filter elements and servicing labor. 
 
 
 Tested to Industry Standards: 
 
 Turbo Precleaners are independently tested to meet industry SAE J726 standards, ensuring their reliability and performance. 
 
 
 
Invest in the Turbo II Precleaner for ultimate engine protection and cleaner air. Enjoy the peace of mind that comes with extended filter life and increased engine longevity. With Turbo II, your engine stays protected, no matter the application or operating conditions. 
 
 Choose EcoPro for superior filtration solutions.

products.description: Who would have thought it’d be possible for an operator to operate a machine in some of the most extreme environments surrounded by some of the worst air in the world, yet breathe some of the cleanest air in the world without a respirator? With EcoPro, it is! Benefits 99.9% Efficient at 0.3 microns and larger! Best-in-class Meets European EN15695 Standard Progressive Solid Metal Enclosure Longevity German-engineered Motor Longevity All kits include machine-specific installation hardware Making it simple Removes organic vapors Health Massive 4-stage filters Long-life filters Cab Air Pressurizer Highlights Durable Rugged, powder-coated steel enclosure built for harsh environments Efficient Up to 99% efficient at 0.3µm (MPP) Health-focused Removes organic vapors including diesel fumes Long lasting Up to 2,000-hour recommended filter change interval Experience the Cleanest Air in the World At EcoPro, we are proud to present the CAF Cab Air Pressurizer and Filtration System. Developed by CAF (Clean Air Filter), this system is designed and tested to deliver air that is up to 200 times cleaner than leading competitors at 0.3 microns. The result is a cleaner, safer cabin environment for operators working long hours in demanding conditions. Safety and Comfort for Operators Providing a safe and healthy work environment is critical for productivity. EcoPro systems actively filter out pollutants, allergens, and harmful particles, creating a cleaner micro-environment inside the cabin that helps operators stay focused and comfortable. Unmatched Durability and Efficiency Featuring a robust powder-coated steel enclosure and an industrial-grade German motor, the pressurizer is built for long-term reliability. With up to 99% efficiency at 0.3µm (MPP), it ensures only clean air circulates inside the cabin. Extended Filter Life and Easy Maintenance Under normal conditions, filters require replacement at approximately 2,000 hours with proper cleaning. Even in extreme environments, filters can last up to 1,000 hours, reducing downtime and maintenance costs. Innovative Three-Stage Filtration Process Pre-cleaner separates larger particulates using a circular airflow, extending filter life. Primary filtration stages: Stage 1: Paper media captures heavy dust and liquid aerosol droplets. Stage 2: Activated carbon adsorbs organic vapors, diesel, and chemical fumes. Stage 3: Sub-micron final filter captures up to 99.998% of particles at 0.3µm. Clean air is circulated into the cabin, creating positive pressure that pushes contaminants out through small leaks. Optional differential pressure gauges help monitor system performance and filter life. Join us in prioritizing clean cabin air. Provide your operators with cleaner air, improved comfort, and reliable protection in the toughest environments. Choose EcoPro for a breath of fresh air. .benefits-simple { padding: 20px 0; } .benefits-simple .wrap { max-width: 980px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 16px; } .benefits-simple p { font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.7; margin: 0 0 14px; } .benefits-simple h3 { font-size: 30px; margin: 26px 0 10px; font-weight: 700; } .benefits-simple ul, .benefits-simple ol { margin: 0 0 16px 22px; } .benefits-simple li { font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.7; margin: 6px 0; }

tabs.installation: CCAP Overview (PDF) CCAP – D6T (PDF) CCAP – D85 (PDF) CCAP Handout (PDF)
tabs.maintenance: The EcoPro CCAP system is designed for straightforward installation on heavy equipment when proper preparation and procedures are followed. Typical installation time for a CCAP system is approximately four to six hours, depending on machine configuration and cab condition. Approximate installation time: 4–6 hours Important Safety Note Always use proper personal protective equipment (PPE) and follow standard equipment safety procedures during installation. Pre-Installation Preparation Before installing the CCAP system, thoroughly clean the cab interior and surrounding areas. The cab should then be sealed completely to ensure optimal pressurization and system performance. CCAP Installation Steps Mount the unit Secure the CCAP unit in the designated mounting location. Install air induction Route and install the air induction components as specified. Install electrical connections and DPG Complete all electrical connections and install the Differential Pressure Gauge (DPG) if applicable. Verify proper operation Start the system and confirm correct airflow, pressurization, and system function. Differential Pressure Gauge (Optional) The Differential Pressure Gauge (DPG) may be installed to monitor filter life and cab pressure. In some fleet operations, filters may instead be changed based on preventative maintenance schedules rather than gauge readings, depending on operational efficiency preferences. Enjoy cleanroom-level cab air cleanliness. For machine-specific installation instructions, please contact EcoPro through our contact page. Contact us for machine-specific installation instructions
tabs.warranty: CCAP Maintanence (PDF) Proper maintenance of the EcoPro CCAP system ensures consistent performance, effective filtration, and long service life. Routine inspections and timely filter changes help maintain optimal cab pressurization and air quality. Filter Maintenance Filters should be changed based on in-cab pressure drop as indicated by the Differential Pressure Gauge (DPG), or according to your fleet’s preventative maintenance schedule. Installation and Hardware Checks Do not over-tighten filter nuts during service. Maximum torque is 50 inch-pounds. Over-tightening can damage components and reduce system effectiveness. Hose and Induction Inspection Inspect all air induction hoses at least annually and replace them as needed. Leaks or damage in hoses will reduce system performance and minimize pressurization effectiveness.
tabs.pdfsAndVideos: CCAP systems are backed by a warranty designed to support long-term performance and reliability. Warranty Coverage Most CCAP systems include a two-year warranty covering materials and workmanship. This warranty does not cover damage caused by neglect, misuse, or improper maintenance. Many providers in this product class do not offer warranty coverage.

products.name: Metal Adapters
products.shortDescription: Custom Fit Solutions Designed to match equipment-specific mounting and intake requirements Durable Metal Construction Built for harsh environments and long-term reliability In-House Manufacturing Metal spinning, fabrication, and custom bracket design capabilities
products.description: EcoPro supports its filtration and air quality solutions with in-house resources dedicated to the design, fabrication, and manufacturing of metal components. In heavy equipment and industrial environments, proper fitment and durability are critical. Standard components do not always meet the requirements of real-world applications, which is why EcoPro maintains the capability to produce both standard and custom metal solutions. EcoPro currently supplies Metal Stack Extensions (MSEs) to raise Turbo II HD precleaners, Metal Expansion Adapters (MEAs) to accommodate varying air intake diameters, and a wide range of custom brackets designed specifically for EcoPro systems. These components are engineered to integrate cleanly with equipment while maintaining structural integrity and long service life. When standard options are not sufficient, EcoPro can design and manufacture custom metal solutions to meet unique machine requirements. From dimensional constraints to specialized mounting needs, EcoPro works directly with customers to develop components that fit and perform as intended. Key Benefits Custom-fit solutions Designed to match equipment-specific requirements Durable metal construction Built for harsh environments and long-term use Supports EcoPro systems Compatible with Turbo II, CCAP, and other solutions Flexible design capability Standard and custom components available Improved installation and fitment Reduces modification and installation time In-House Resources Metal spinning Bracket design Bracket fabrication Grommet design and manufacturing HVAC access panel manufacturing Need something you don’t see? EcoPro’s in-house metal fabrication capabilities allow us to develop custom components to support your specific application.

products.name: Rubber Adapters
products.shortDescription: Hard-to-Find Sizes Wide range of rubber sizing adapters and grommets available Improved Sealing Helps prevent leaks, vibration, and component wear Installation Support Simplifies fitment across EcoPro product installations
products.description: EcoPro supports its product lines with a wide range of rubber adapters and sealing components designed to simplify and streamline installations. In heavy equipment and industrial environments, proper sealing, vibration isolation, and fitment are critical. Standard off-the-shelf rubber components often fall short, which is why EcoPro sources and develops hard-to-find but necessary rubber solutions. EcoPro works with dozens of rubber suppliers and manufacturers to provide sizing adapters, grommets, weather sealing components, and specialty rubber parts that accommodate a wide range of installation scenarios. Whether adapting non-standard diameters, sealing irregular openings, or protecting components from vibration and abrasion, EcoPro likely has a solution available. When a standard rubber adapter does not meet the requirement, EcoPro can assist in identifying or developing alternative solutions to ensure proper fitment and long-term performance. These components help reduce installation time, improve system reliability, and extend component life. Key Benefits Simplified installations Reduces modification and rework during installation Wide size availability Supports non-standard and hard-to-find dimensions Improved sealing and protection Helps prevent leaks, vibration, and wear Compatible across product lines Supports EcoPro filtration, lighting, and air systems Flexible sourcing capability Access to a broad network of rubber suppliers Available Resources Various rubber suppliers Grommet design Grommet manufacturing Weather stripping Adhesives Need a rubber adapter you don’t see? EcoPro’s sourcing and manufacturing resources allow us to help identify the right solution for your application.

products.shortDescription: EcoPro's HVAC Access Door with Pressurizer Pipe
products.description: Enhance Efficiency and Performance of HVAC Systems Part Number: HVAC124.0: HD Replacement Door for CAT HVAC Access with 4.0-inch Inlet HVAC123.0: HD Replacement Door for CAT HVAC Access with 3.0-inch Inlet (special order) EcoPro's HVAC Access Door with Pressurizer Pipe is designed to optimize the functionality of HVAC systems, providing improved airflow management and energy efficiency. With our high-quality replacement doors, you can enhance the performance of your CAT HVAC access unit and achieve better results. Key Features: Efficient Airflow: The pressurizer pipe integrated into the access door helps regulate and direct the airflow, ensuring optimal distribution throughout the HVAC system. This promotes better cooling/heating performance and balanced air circulation. Enhanced Energy Efficiency: By optimizing airflow, our access door reduces energy waste and enhances the overall energy efficiency of HVAC systems. This leads to cost savings and a more environmentally friendly operation. High-Quality Replacement: Our HD replacement doors are specifically designed for CAT HVAC access units, ensuring a perfect fit and seamless integration. The 4.0-inch or 3.0-inch inlet options cater to different requirements, providing flexibility for various applications. Durable Construction: EcoPro's HVAC Access Door is built to withstand demanding conditions. Made from high-quality materials, it offers exceptional durability, corrosion resistance, and longevity, ensuring reliable performance over time. Please note that pricing details are not mentioned in this description. For pricing information, please refer to the provided part numbers or contact our customer support team. Upgrade your HVAC system with EcoPro's HVAC Access Door with Pressurizer Pipe and experience improved airflow management, enhanced energy efficiency, and reliable performance. Contact us today to discuss your specific requirements and discover how our solution can benefit your HVAC system.

products.name: MSE-60M06
products.shortDescription: 6.0" DIAMETER METAL STACK EXTENSION; HEIGHT 6.0" (straight top, expanded and slotted bottom)
products.description: EcoPro supports its filtration and air quality solutions with in-house resources dedicated to the design, fabrication, and manufacturing of metal components. In heavy equipment and industrial environments, proper fitment and durability are critical. Standard components do not always meet the requirements of real-world applications, which is why EcoPro maintains the capability to produce both standard and custom metal solutions. EcoPro currently supplies Metal Stack Extensions (MSEs) to raise Turbo II HD precleaners, Metal Expansion Adapters (MEAs) to accommodate varying air intake diameters, and a wide range of custom brackets designed specifically for EcoPro systems. These components are engineered to integrate cleanly with equipment while maintaining structural integrity and long service life. When standard options are not sufficient, EcoPro can design and manufacture custom metal solutions to meet unique machine requirements. From dimensional constraints to specialized mounting needs, EcoPro works directly with customers to develop components that fit and perform as intended. Key Benefits Custom-fit solutions Designed to match equipment-specific requirements Durable metal construction Built for harsh environments and long-term use Supports EcoPro systems Compatible with Turbo II, CCAP, and other solutions Flexible design capability Standard and custom components available Improved installation and fitment Reduces modification and installation time In-House Resources Metal spinning Bracket design Bracket fabrication Grommet design and manufacturing HVAC access panel manufacturing Need something you don’t see? EcoPro’s in-house metal fabrication capabilities allow us to develop custom components to support your specific application.

products.name: H3002F
products.shortDescription: 1,800 Lumens Flood 16-watt output with a compact 2 LED flood configuration Mining-Grade Durability Rated to 21.2 Grms with IP68 and IP69K protection Easy Integration 9–32V DC operation with DT plug and single-bolt mount
products.description: H30 LED fixtures are mining-grade lighting solutions designed specifically for heavy equipment operating in extreme environments. In industries such as waste, mining, construction, and industrial processing, lighting systems are exposed to constant vibration, impact, moisture, temperature swings, and electrical noise. H30 fixtures are engineered to survive these conditions while delivering reliable, high-output illumination. Built using modern engineering practices and updated manufacturing processes, H30 mining-grade LEDs combine exceptional durability, compact design, and high efficiency. These fixtures deliver industry-leading performance while maintaining one of the lowest cost-per-lumen values available. EcoPro also offers machine-specific upgrade kits to simplify installation and retrofitting across a wide range of equipment. Highlights Industry-leading vibration resistance Rated to 21.2 Grms, among the highest on the market High efficiency output Delivers up to 105 lumens per watt Low cost per lumen Under $0.05 per lumen for long-term value Compact form factor All fixtures under 5.0 inches by 5.0 inches, fits almost anywhere Pre-installed wiring Includes an 8-inch lead with professionally installed DT connector IP68/69K rated Fully sealed for extreme environmental protection Extended beam distance Ranges from approximately 128 feet to 292 feet depending on configuration Advanced thermal management Intelli-sync system designed for long service life Pulse width modulation control Supports consistent output and component longevity Voltage spike protection Built-in protection against electrical surges CISPR 25 compliant Designed to minimize electromagnetic interference Photobiologically tested Certified to IEC/EN 62471 safety standards Built for Extreme Environments H30 fixtures are designed to withstand the harshest operating conditions where standard work lights fail. With a rugged housing, high vibration tolerance, and sealed construction, these lights continue to perform in applications involving heavy shock loads, frequent washdowns, airborne debris, and continuous operation. High Output with Efficient Power Use By delivering up to 105 lumens per watt, H30 LEDs provide powerful illumination while reducing overall power consumption. This efficiency allows operators to maximize visibility without overloading electrical systems, making H30 fixtures well suited for both new equipment and retrofit applications. Compact Design and Easy Installation H30 lights feature a compact footprint that allows installation in tight mounting locations commonly found on modern equipment. Each fixture is pre-wired with an 8-inch lead and DT connector, reducing installation time and ensuring a secure electrical connection. EcoPro machine upgrade kits further simplify installation across different equipment models. Thermal Control and Long Service Life Advanced thermal management using Intelli-sync technology helps regulate operating temperatures and protect internal components. This design extends LED lifespan, maintains consistent output over time, and reduces the likelihood of premature failure in high-duty-cycle applications. Electrical and Safety Compliance H30 fixtures are engineered with built-in voltage spike protection and are CISPR 25 compliant to minimize electrical interference. Photobiological testing to IEC/EN 62471 standards ensures safe light output for operators and surrounding personnel. H30 mining-grade LED fixtures deliver maximum durability, high-efficiency illumination, and long service life for heavy equipment operating in the most demanding environments.

tabs.maintenance: H30 LED fixtures are designed for fast and straightforward installation on heavy equipment. Most installations can be completed quickly with minimal tools when proper mounting locations are available. Approximate installation time per LED: 5–15 minutes Installation Details Most H30 LEDs use a single-bolt mounting configuration (M6x20 or M8x20), allowing for quick and secure installation. Each fixture comes pre-installed with an 8-inch lead and a professionally installed DT connector to simplify wiring. Machine-Specific Kits Machine-specific installation kits are available to ensure proper fitment and clean integration. Contact us for machine-specific installation instructions
tabs.pdfsAndVideos: H30 LED fixtures are backed by a warranty designed to support long-term performance in demanding environments. Warranty Coverage H30 LEDs include a standard three-year warranty covering materials and workmanship from the date of purchase.

Highlights Industry-leading vibration resistance Rated to 21.2 Grms, among the highest on the market High efficiency output Delivers up to 105 lumens per watt Low cost per lumen Under $0.05 per lumen for long-term value Compact form factor All fixtures under 5.0 inches by 5.0 inches, fits almost anywhere Pre-installed wiring Includes an 8-inch lead with professionally installed DT connector IP68/69K rated Fully sealed for extreme environmental protection Extended beam distance Ranges from approximately 128 feet to 292 feet depending on configuration Advanced thermal management Intelli-sync system designed for long service life Pulse width modulation control Supports consistent output and component longevity Voltage spike protection Built-in protection against electrical surges CISPR 25 compliant Designed to minimize electromagnetic interference Photobiologically tested Certified to IEC/EN 62471 safety standards Built for Extreme Environments H30 fixtures are designed to withstand the harshest operating conditions where standard work lights fail. With a rugged housing, high vibration tolerance, and sealed construction, these lights continue to perform in applications involving heavy shock loads, frequent washdowns, airborne debris, and continuous operation. High Output with Efficient Power Use By delivering up to 105 lumens per watt, H30 LEDs provide powerful illumination while reducing overall power consumption. This efficiency allows operators to maximize visibility without overloading electrical systems, making H30 fixtures well suited for both new equipment and retrofit applications. Compact Design and Easy Installation H30 lights feature a compact footprint that allows installation in tight mounting locations commonly found on modern equipment. Each fixture is pre-wired with an 8-inch lead and DT connector, reducing installation time and ensuring a secure electrical connection. EcoPro machine upgrade kits further simplify installation across different equipment models. Thermal Control and Long Service Life Advanced thermal management using Intelli-sync technology helps regulate operating temperatures and protect internal components. This design extends LED lifespan, maintains consistent output over time, and reduces the likelihood of premature failure in high-duty-cycle applications. Electrical and Safety Compliance H30 fixtures are engineered with built-in voltage spike protection and are CISPR 25 compliant to minimize electrical interference. Photobiological testing to IEC/EN 62471 standards ensures safe light output for operators and surrounding personnel. H30 mining-grade LED fixtures deliver maximum durability, high-efficiency illumination, and long service life for heavy equipment operating in the most demanding environments.

products.description: Why bring mining-grade beacons to the heavy equipment market? Because in extreme operating environments, reliability and durability are critical. Industries such as waste, mining, construction, and industrial operations subject equipment to constant vibration, exposure, and harsh conditions where standard warning lights often fail. H01 LED mining-grade beacons are engineered specifically for these environments. Designed with the highest durability ratings available on the market, H01 beacons deliver dependable warning visibility while withstanding extreme vibration, washdowns, and continuous use. EcoPro also offers machine-specific upgrade kits to simplify installation and ensure proper fitment across a wide range of equipment. H01 beacons are available in multiple colors and mounting configurations to meet safety requirements and equipment standards. With flexible options and proven designs, these beacons provide reliable performance without compromising durability or ease of installation. Key Benefits Industry-leading vibration resistance Rated to 21.2 Grms, among the highest on the market Multiple color options Available in amber, blue, and green for application-specific visibility Flexible mounting options Offered with US flanged, magnetic, or single-bolt bases US-sized design Matches US equipment standards and fits almost anywhere Configurable beam patterns Customizable warning patterns to meet site and safety requirements IP68/69K rated Fully sealed for dust, water immersion, and high-pressure washdowns Proven reliability Over 20 years of real-world use in demanding environments H01 mining-grade beacons deliver dependable warning visibility, extreme durability, and flexible installation options for heavy equipment operating in the harshest conditions.

products.name: Tipper LED Upgrade
products.shortDescription: High-Output Illumination Delivers over 30,000 effective lumens for wide-area visibility Operator Safety Focused Anti-glare light distribution across ramps, walkways, and deck areas Built for Tippers Durable housings with trunnion mounts and optional protective deflectors
products.description: The EcoPro Tipper LED Upgrade Kit provides complete, high-performance lighting for landfill and heavy-equipment tippers. Engineered for both visibility and driver comfort, this kit combines four purpose-built LED assemblies totaling more than 30,000 effective lumens. Each lighting position is optimized for safety: 56-LED floodlight (15,300 lm) mounted off the cab for rear-right walkway illumination. 27-LED floodlight (8,300 lm) installed near the genset for rear-left coverage. 5-LED anti-glare lamp (3,500 lm) focused on ramp lighting without blinding operators. 12-inch surface light (2,700 lm) positioned at cab steps and entryways. All fixtures feature sealed heavy-equipment housings, trunnion mounts, and optional deflector brackets. The result is a clean, uniform lighting pattern that increases operator visibility, reduces glare for nearby drivers, and improves nighttime safety around the tipper. Ideal for landfill fleets, transfer stations, and other high-duty environments where reliability, simplicity, and effective light coverage matter most.

products.name: H0507
products.shortDescription: Jump Starter (up to 7.0L Diesel) Reliable portable power with 2,000 starts, reverse polarity protection, rapid restart, LCD display, and a 2-year warranty.
products.description: H0507 Jumpstarter The H0507 Jumpstarter is designed for service trucks, yard crews, and equipment operators who need reliable power without carrying extra weight. It is compact, easy to handle, and built for everyday fleet use. Lithium battery rated for 2,000 cycles Jump-starts 12V and 24V systems up to 7.0L diesel 12V 750A and 24V 500A output Reverse polarity protection for safer operation Charges from vehicle, USB-C, or 120VAC dock IP65 construction for dusty and wet environments Lightweight design at 5.73 lbs This unit is a practical solution for light and medium-duty fleets that still demand commercial performance. Lithium Iron Phosphate Explained A Lithium Iron Phosphate (LiFePO4 or LFP) battery is a rechargeable lithium-ion battery known for its excellent safety, long lifespan (thousands of cycles), stability, and lower cost due to replacing cobalt with iron, making it ideal for EVs, solar storage, and RVs, though it has lower energy density than other lithium types. These batteries use graphite and lithium iron phosphate for their electrodes and require a Battery Management System (BMS) for protection against overcharging or deep discharge, offering fast charging and efficient power delivery.
